rows.label: xs12010150_MSG0001
rows.name:
It is as Director General Maurice
said. Time is of the essence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010150_MSG0003
rows.name:
The mission is the securing of the Central
Life and the switch to the backup system.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010150_MSG0004
rows.name:
The location is under analysis but will be finished
within two hours. Sortie as soon as it is clarified![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010150_MSG0005
rows.name:
I request the participation of all BLADEs. It is
a harsh mission, but I'm counting on everyone![ST:wait ]
